chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 942 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2151/2025. 2. For hearing of CMA No.864/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.4189/2024. 08.10.2025 Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ismail Shah, advocate for the respondent. 1. Urgency granted. It is jointly stated that the impugned judgment is devoid of any independent reasons and / or deliberations, therefore, it may be just and proper to set aside the impugned judgment and remand the matter for adjudication afresh. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
